description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, featuring a mix of large and small windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front and rear facades. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, likely stucco or painted concrete, with prominent window frames and a central entryway. The house includes a fenced backyard with green lawn space and a detached garage or auxiliary structure adjacent to the main building. The rear of the house opens onto the yard with sliding glass doors, providing access to the outdoor area. The property is bordered by a wooden fence, and there are additional small outdoor fixtures or utility elements visible near the garage. The overall design is clean and functional, with minimal decorative elements and an emphasis on geometric lines.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a fenced backyard, and a detached garage, featuring clean lines and a neutral exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical window arrangement, and the attached garage structure to the right.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the fenced backyard, detached garage, and additional small outdoor fixtures.
description_view_2: Back view displaying sliding glass doors opening to the lawn, full view of the fenced yard, and the garage to the left.
description_view_3: Side view with minimal windows, clear view of the flat roof, and the expanse of the backyard fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a simple door, no porch, and minimal decorative elements
